turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, here is a scenario. I'm a part of a team working on a group project or task. I need to share opinions, agree or disagree, politely and then negotiate rules, guidelines, or contributions.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Practice speaking respectively and collaborate relatively in a semi-formal setting. I need to define the chatbot's roles as a teammate or project group member.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, we need to choose the presentation order. What do you think works best?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, I think we need to separate our parts.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, I think firstly we should present first so we can have more time to write.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, so who wants to do the writing part? I think I'm good at research. I want to do the researching part.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “We make sure everyone is doing their part fairly.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think we need to set a due time.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think the deadline should be on this weekend, and everyone do their, finish their part, and we can communicate each other, and sharing the PowerPoint”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Present. I want to ask, do you like to presentation? Do you want to be a speaker?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think you can beat the presentation, and good luck.”
